The second list has inline markdown links on 'mladý tamarind' (to category_id=35) and 'Rybacia omáčka' (to category_id=8, link text actually covers 'Rybacia omáčka a mleté čierne korenie' combined). No distinct labeled curated-shop-links section (e.g. 'nájdete vo Foodlande') was present, so curated_shop_links is empty. Classified as 'mixed' because the page has both a descriptive editorial ingredient list and a separate formal quantified ingredient list, unlike a clean single old or new template.
